title: 中山金杯の後に・幸先ええで！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kimpai is a special race that brings good
luck, and with Tamamo Cross eager to seize some
for herself, it comes at the perfect time for her to
enter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And victory is hers! As spring blossoms in
Nakayama, Tamamo Cross shares her blessings
with her fans.
